evals.prompt: I just added skill-trigger-evalsmith. Make sure Codex, Claude Code, and Kimi Code can all see it from this repo without copying the skill three times.
evals.expected_output: Checks canonical SKILL.md, creates or repairs provider links, and reports user-level install options without duplicating content.

evals.prompt: I renamed a skill but now it appears under both the old and new names in some clients. Sync the install state safely.
evals.expected_output: Inventories old/new names, classifies duplicates or conflicts, repairs links, and avoids deleting real directories without explicit confirmation.

evals.prompt: Check if my .agents copy of official-ai-devdocs is making duplicates now that we use .codex and .kimi-code folders.
evals.expected_output: Inspects legacy .agents roots, compares content with canonical source, and reports safe cleanup options without automatic destructive deletion.
